title: UnderwritingServiceTypeValues
description: Evaluates the creditworthiness, financial stability, or risk profile of the borrower, issuer, or counterparty.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Commitment & Guarantee Underwriting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides a guarantee to fund or purchase all or part of a financial transaction, such as a loan, bond issue, or IPO.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pricing & Structuring Underwriting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Determines interest rates, fees, spreads, or terms of the product. Structures repayment schedules, covenants, or allocation rules.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Distribution & Placement Underwriting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Facilitates the sale or allocation of securities, loans, or products to investors, clients, or syndicates.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Documentation & Compliance Underwriting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Prepares and verifies legal and regulatory documents to ensure compliance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Monitoring & Reporting Underwriting Service
x-enumeration-literals.description: Tracks underwriting commitments, fees, and disbursements. Provides reports for internal management, regulators, and investors.
